transcript.text:
I've visited this restaurant the most
[2 years ago]
[No matter how many times]
[Filled with customers]
[Tzuyang's all-time-favorite] [Jaeil Bunsik]
[26 years of memory]
[Always hits the spot]
[This is Tzuyang's favorite tteokboki spot!] (Spicy rice cake)
Hello everyone
I'm here at Miasageori today
I've introduced my most favorite tteokboki restaurant before
[A place that she showed us about a year ago]
I'm back here because I've been craving it
They used to be located inside a market
But now they moved locations
Let's go I want some already

It used to be inside this market
And now it's over here
[Jaeil Bunsik] [Seoul, Kangbuk-gu]
-Hello -Hello
[They brought her autograph here too!]
They seem to be very busy right now It's a full-house and there are a lot of to-go packages
What should I get? Tteokboki...
5 plates of them?
Their Mattang is good too (Honey covered sweet potato)
[Goes on to say that everything tastes good here]
[Let's go order]
5 servings of tteokboki,
1 kimbap, 1 tempura
1 soondae, 1 mattang, 1 japchae
[Good to see her again!]
[She's still the same!]

[Soondae] (Pork Blood Sausage)
[Tteokboki] (Spicy Rice Cake)
Thank you
Looks good
I had to come back for some more
I eat here at least once a month
Bon appetit
Tteokboki first
They use rice to make their rice cakes
I have not had any rice cake that tastes better that this
It's really good
I think they just made this batch
You can taste the difference if it's fresh or not
Both taste great though
I'm happy
Let's start after finishing this plate

So good
It tastes even better for me because it brings me back old memories
It's a traditional tteokboki sauce with gochujang (red chili paste)
A bit spicy
They have their own unique tteokboki flavors
A throwback
A piece of Mattang when it starts to get spicy
This will reset the spice level
The flavors are deep because they cook it for a long time
Strong black pepper flavors
And it's very bold
Soondae (Pork blood sausage)
The glass noodles are very thin
Tasty
These mini kimbaps are crack too
The tteokboki sauce is universal

I never really ate their tempuras when I come here
It's not like the modern tempura with thin batters
Old-style tempuras with thick batters
Recently, my friend asked me which meal I would eat before death
And I thought about this place
I have good memories from here
My mom used to always bring me here
Every time we're nearby, we would eat here and to-go some more for later
Mattang is very delicious
5 pieces
It's a skewer
More fishcake soup, please
There's always a piece of fishcake when you get a refill
Way too hot for me to drink
That's hot I burned myself
This piece looks weird

With salt
Can't go wrong with salt
Can I get an autograph?
[Of course you can]
I started coming here because of Tzuyang
You came once and kept coming?
Yes, even today
Incredible!
Thank you
One of the proudest moments of doing mukbang is when my subscribers come to a restaurant and fall in love enough to revisit
I'm on cloud nine
I'm craving something cold now
They have shaved ice
Excuse me, Can you do shaved ice right now?
-Would you like 1? -Without red beans, please
Alright

[Can't miss out of shaved ice during the summer]
I only put the syrup
Take out the red bean if you don't want it
I can't eat red beans, but they said there's no other toppings if they don't put it
So I said I was okay with the syrup
[Mix the condensed milk]
[Brain freeze]
Yummy
[Don't forget... You're here for Tteokboki...]
Right, tteokboki
I was supposed to eat the liver first It's too late now
It's cold already
There are a lot of customers
2,500 Won for tteokboki is very cheap (~$1.91 USD)
It used to be 1,500 Won when I used to be a regular
The dishes you must order when you're here:

Tteokboki, mini kimbap, mattang,
Where's my japchae? (glass noodles)
Excuse me, My japchae...
[Oops, coming right up]
-Your japchae is here -Thank you
Let's put it right over here
Can I also get 1 more shaved ice and fishcake soup? Thank you
I feel bad ordering because they're so busy
-Soup -Thank you
Japchae Must have some right now
It's better to eat it fresh like this
It's seasoned really well
With tteokboki sauce just like this
Shaved ice
Thank you
[Humongous]

They gave me so much
It should be easier to mix like this
I always end up being a messy eater when I come here
All aggressive
Another reason why I'm back here if that I came just before their closing hours the last time I was here
So I didn't really get to eat right
[But she still had 12 servings of food...]
I will take my time and enjoy the food today
[It's not rice wine...]
I will end it here since there are a lot of customers
Thanks everyone
[Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
